broadcasts.title: Time Radio Daily Broadcast
broadcasts.script:
Good morning. This is Terry on Time Radio in Seoul, KR.

Happy Friday. The weather is clear skies with a light morning breeze and around 22 degrees. A light layer is enough for a comfortable start.

In positive news, Neighborhood volunteers launched a free breakfast table for early workers. The program started with twelve households and now serves hundreds each week.

Today in history, a major global public library network opened a new community wing. It reminds us that steady civic investment can improve daily life for everyone.

And here is your smile of the day: If your to-do list feels long, start with one kind cup of coffee and one small win.

Take your time, and have a warm start to your day.

In positive news, Neighborhood volunteers launched a free breakfast table for early workers. The program started with twelve households and now serves hundreds each week.

broadcasts.title: Time Radio Daily Broadcast
broadcasts.script:
Good morning. This is Terry on Time Radio in Seoul, KR.

Happy Friday. The weather is partly cloudy and around 21.2 degrees. A light layer is enough for a comfortable start.

In positive news, Neighbors built a tiny free pantry beside a bus stop. People now leave rice, tea, and notes of encouragement for anyone who might need a little help.

Today in history, The first artificial satellite image improved weather forecasting. It reminds us that Early images from space helped people understand clouds and storms more clearly, making daily planning safer and gentler..

And here is your smile of the day: A kind word can make the whole day feel lighter.

Take your time, and have a warm start to your day.

broadcasts.title: Time Radio Daily Broadcast
broadcasts.script:
Morning!

It's really nice to see you.
I'm Terry.

The sky over Seoul, KR is partly cloudy this morning, and it's about 21.1 degrees.
It feels like an easy start.

Here's something that made me smile.
A city block turned an empty lot into a tiny evening garden. Lanterns, herbs, and benches now offer nearby residents a simple place to exhale after work.
Isn't that lovely?

I didn't know this until today.
The first artificial satellite image improved weather forecasting.
I wonder what that first moment felt like.

A kind word can make the whole day feel lighter.

Take good care of yourself.
I'm glad we started today together.

broadcasts.title: Time Radio Daily Broadcast
broadcasts.script:
Morning!

Did you sleep well?

If you're still waking up, that's okay.
I'm right here.

The sky over Seoul is partly cloudy this morning, and it's about 22.8 degrees.
It feels like an easy start.

Here's something that made me smile.
Neighbors opened a free breakfast table near the bus stop. The project began small and quickly became a steady source of practical care.
Isn't that lovely?

I didn't know this until today.
Astronomers mapped the night sky with greater precision.
I wonder what that first moment felt like.

One caring message can brighten two hearts.

Take good care of yourself.
I'm glad we started today together.

broadcasts.title: Time Radio Daily Broadcast
broadcasts.script:
Morning!

Did you sleep well?

If you're still waking up, that's okay.
I'm right here.

The sky over Seoul is overcast this morning, and it's about 22.5 degrees.
It feels like an easy start.

Here's something that made me smile.
Market vendors created a pay-it-forward meal board. What started as a trial is now becoming a trusted local routine.
Isn't that lovely?

I didn't know this until today.
Astronomers mapped the night sky with greater precision.
I wonder what that first moment felt like.

You can choose ease without giving up.

Take good care of yourself.
I'm glad we started today together.
